zh.lifeSummary: 當Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie於大約1190年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie37歲，母親Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn22歲。他於1244年與Catherine Mure結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1253年7月之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie于大约1190年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie37岁，母亲Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn22岁。他于1244年与Catherine Mure结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1253年7月之后。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Norino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Noreen
meanings: Originally an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Nóirín . It is now used as an independent given name in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Honorine
meanings: From Late Latin Honorina, a derivative of Honoria. See Honore .

en.lifeSummary: When Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie was born about 1190, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie, was 37 and his mother, Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn, was 22. He married Catherine Mure in 1244. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died after July 1253.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie est né environ 1190, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Mure en 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé après juillet 1253.

de.lifeSummary: Als Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie um 1190 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie 37 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn 22. Er hat 1244 Catherine Mure geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb nach Juli 1253.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie è nato il circa 1190 nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Mure nel 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì dopo il luglio 1253.

ja.lifeSummary: Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurieが約1190年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslieは37歳，母Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lornは22歳であった。1244年にCatherine Mureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1253年7月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1244년 Catherine Mure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1253년 7월 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Mure em 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu após julho de 1253.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie родился около 1190 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Mure в 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер после июля 1253 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie nació aproximadamente 1190, en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Catherine Mure en 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió después de julio de 1253.
